validated_json.name: Master Agreement / Order Form
validated_json.description: Master agreement for Blue Leaf Logistics with Silver Orbit Systems; recurring subscription base fee plus variable usage charges, supplemented by Order Form and Amendment 1.

phases.name: Recurring Subscription
phases.description: Customer pays a recurring subscription fee plus variable usage charges for excess consumption. Amendment 1 states the average schedule supplements the base fee and does not replace the recurring commitment.
